description: Use this API to impose a contingency specified in the Distribution Factor Data file and apply the generation dispatch algorithm used in contingency analysis on the working case. The network can then be solved by power flow solutions. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.3.3. ierr = gendsp_2(options, syslabel, cntlabel, dfxfile, thrfile, inlfile)
python_syntax: ierr = gendsp_2(options, syslabel, cntlabel, dfxfile, thrfile, inlfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying options. (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of the distribution factor data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: thrfile
parameters.description: Name of the load throwover data file. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: inlfile
parameters.description: Name of the unit inertia and governor data file. (input; blank by default).

options.description: impose a contingency case on the working case.

error_codes.description: no Distribution Factor Data File specified.
too many islands in base case.
contingency not found in Distribution Factor Data File.
file is not in the form of a PSSE-25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
no subsystem defined in Distribution Factor Data file.
error opening Distribution Factor Data File.
error opening Load Throwover Data File.
error opening Unit Inertia and Governor Data File.
error opening or writing temporary Saved Case File.
prerequisite requirements for function not met.
